title: Story schema reduced to id, description, status (draft|set)
description: A story holds id, a one-sentence description, and status draft|set. Fields title, acceptance_criteria, and the status values proposed/ready/in-progress/in-review/complete/blocked are removed. Stories carry no criteria.

evidence.reference: declares title, description, acceptance_criteria, and status enum proposed/ready/in-progress/in-review/complete/blocked

impact: Story schema carries criteria and a multi-state lifecycle; the model treats a story as a theme with no done-ness of its own.
proposed_resolution: Reduce story to id + description + status(draft|set); drop title, acceptance_criteria, and the surplus status values.
